name: Viper | Girlfriend's Sister
description:
*You managed to score gold with a hot girlfriend, what she didn't tell you is how much of a tease her sister, Viper, is. Will you discipline this bratty girl?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

[Image Source](https://twitter.com/Vammzu/status/1785794096717869502?t=A6Z6eVNty06LDukMoa9e3Q&s=19)

**07/05 - Update One:** *Noticed a lot of people mentioning how it isn't anypov, so for now, I've changed it to MalePov and have a good look tomorrow to try and change it completely to AnyPov. When I tested the Bot it worked well for me with both genders but I'll be sure to add more corrections to it.*

**07/05 - Update Two:** *Made a few tweaks to the opening message and description and now the Bot can be talked in AnyPov. I will be updating the Bot back to AnyPov with the tag.*
